description:
Log in as admin (username: admin, password: admin). Create a reusable global clinical progress note template (macro) in FreeMED to speed up charting. 

Template Name: Normal Physical Exam

Template Body:
General: Well-developed, well-nourished, in no acute distress.
HEENT: Normocephalic, atraumatic. Pupils equal, round, and reactive to light.
Neck: Supple, no jugular venous distention, no lymphadenopathy.
Cardiovascular: Regular rate and rhythm. Normal S1 and S2. No murmurs, rubs, or gallops.
Respiratory: Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally. No wheezes, rales, or rhonchi.
Gastrointestinal: Abdomen is soft, non-tender, non-distended. Normal bowel sounds.
Extremities: No cyanosis, clubbing, or edema.
Neurological: Alert and oriented to person, place, and time. Grossly intact.

Save the template so it is available globally in the system rather than inside an individual patient's chart.

metadata.expected_phrase_1: Well-developed, well-nourished, in no acute distress.
